data.name: Dengenki Days
data.detailed_description:
An erotic Visual Novel featuring "choose your own adventure" style gameplay. Guide the protagonists through a heist where your choices affect the outcome. In order to advance the story, you must be successful in the mission by selecting the right options.

Juno and Bjetti, are two freelancers just trying to pay their rent in a vibrant science fantasy world. When a smash-and-grab job goes wrong, they find themselves getting more than they bargained for! What was the mysterious package they were asked to steal? Who beat them to the punch? And why is it that they get the feeling that they are being watched?

They are about to find out that small surprises can lead to big packages. That means they're totally gonna get fucked crazy style.

Aliens, robots, and more- hunks and hotties from across outer space will be encountered in this comedic cyberpunk escapade! Here are some of the features:

  • EXPLORE the WORLD-  Each chapter will feature their own "boardgame"-like map to navigate and overcome!

  • EXPERIENCE the STORY- Lighthearted character-focused narrative packed with guffaws and giga-cocks!

  • EXPERIMENT in the SANDBOX- Replay maps from the story mode, take different routes and unlock different scenes

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 and Newer
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
